How we help › Advanced Sports Therapy
For all • All ages • Every stage of life

Expert therapy to restore movement, function and fitness

Assessment, hands-on treatment and a rehabilitation plan built around you, regardless of age or ability: recovering from an injury at work, getting back to daily life after a setback, or working towards your best sporting performance.

What it's for · broadened per Dean: not sport and activity people only · plain outcomes, no sub modality names, per the services messaging map · sidebar keeps the booking route visible
What it's for

Care built around how you move, not just how you play

Advanced Sports Therapy is for anyone whose movement, function or fitness has been affected, regardless of age or ability: an injury at work, recovery after an operation, an ongoing ache that limits daily life, or a sporting setback. Whatever brought you, the aim is the same: understand what is actually going on, treat it properly, and get you back to doing what you need and want to do.

Every session starts with a thorough assessment, not just a quick look at the painful spot. From there we combine hands-on treatment with a rehabilitation plan built around you: the movements, the loads and the timeframes that suit your daily life, your work or your sport, adjusted as you progress.

Get in touch

The easiest first step is a conversation. Tell us what is going on and we will point you the right way, with no pressure at all.

Call 07773 814488
Three benefit tiles · accessible layer, plain outcomes, no technique names · tile heading kept as assessment, adjective set to thorough for this page
What to expect

What Advanced Sports Therapy involves

A thorough assessment

We look at the problem and the wider picture: how you move, function and recover, so nothing gets missed.

Hands-on treatment

Targeted, skilled treatment to ease pain, reduce swelling and restore movement, at a pace that suits you.

A route back to what matters to you

A rehabilitation plan that rebuilds strength and confidence in stages, whether that means returning to work, daily life or sport.

Veiled photo band · 70% navy wash, ported from the homepage CTA treatment · photo SportsClinical-108, supplied by Dean What it means for you

Hands-on care, tailored to you

Every technique is chosen for what it can do for your particular injury or goal, not applied by default. Treatment is adjusted session to session as you progress, so it keeps working for you rather than following a fixed routine.

Reassurance · approved copy, reused verbatim from Our Approach · safe, gentle, at your pace Reassurance

Safe, gentle, and at your pace

Everything is done with care and at a pace that suits you, and nothing is rushed or forced. The aim throughout is simple: that you feel in good hands, understood, and steadily better.

Recognised and accountable

Held to recognised professional standards

Members and registrants of the Royal Society of Medicine, the Complementary and Natural Healthcare Council, the Institute for Functional Medicine, the Society of Sports Therapists, the Institute of Sport and Remedial Massage and the British Medical Acupuncture Society, among others.
